_comment: Phase C trainer badges. Loaded by engine/badges.py. Each badge is single-tier (earned or not) -- crossing requirement_value on requirement_type permanently earns it, grants +1 perk point, and queues a pending_badge_unlocks notification. requirement_type is resolved by engine.badges._stat_value. Badge board shown by `devmon badges`; rank (engine.badges.compute_rank) is derived from badges_earned count + player level.

badges.name: Terminal Veteran
badges.flavor: 500 commands deep. The shell knows your name.

badges.name: Commit History
badges.flavor: 50 commits. Somewhere, a graph turned green.

badges.name: Green Pipeline
badges.flavor: 25 passing test runs. CI trusts you now.

badges.name: Week Streak
badges.flavor: Seven days straight. The grace period never even flinched.

badges.name: Battle-Hardened
badges.flavor: 50 wild victories. Your creatures don't flinch anymore.

badges.name: Master Cataloguer
badges.flavor: 40 species logged. Half the known world, roughly.

badges.name: World Traveler
badges.flavor: 3 regions unlocked. The map keeps getting bigger.

badges.name: Favorite Customer
badges.flavor: 5 NPC fetch quests turned in. They remember your face.

badges.name: Candy Dealer
badges.flavor: 50 candies fed. Your team never stops growing.

badges.name: Twenty-Five Club
badges.flavor: Level 25. You've shipped a lot of code to get here.
